recommendations.title: The Cotton Club
recommendations.overview: Harlem's legendary Cotton Club becomes a hotbed of passion and violence as the lives and loves of entertainers and gangsters collide.

recommendations.title: School Daze
recommendations.overview: Fraternity and sorority members clash with other students at a historically black college during homecoming weekend.

recommendations.title: The Nines
recommendations.overview: A troubled actor, a television show runner, and an acclaimed videogame designer find their lives intertwining in mysterious and unsettling ways.

recommendations.title: The Usual Suspects
recommendations.overview: Held in an L.A. interrogation room, Verbal Kint attempts to convince the feds that a mythic crime lord, Keyser Soze, not only exists, but was also responsible for drawing him and his four partners into a multi-million dollar heist that ended with an

recommendations.title: Poker Night
recommendations.overview: When a new detective is caught by a vicious psychopath and locked in a basement, he must use the knowledge he learned from some of the best detectives at Poker Night, then match wits against his captor.

recommendations.title: The Disaster Artist
recommendations.overview: An aspiring actor in Hollywood meets an enigmatic stranger by the name of Tommy Wiseau, the meeting leads the actor down a path nobody could have predicted; creating the worst movie ever made.

recommendations.title: Future World
recommendations.overview: A young boy searches a future world wasteland for a rumored cure for his dying mother.

recommendations.title: Twilight
recommendations.overview: A retired detective accepts a simple task, unaware that it will tear open old, forgotten, but deadly wounds.

recommendations.title: MaXXXine
recommendations.overview: In 1980s Hollywood, adult film star and aspiring actress Maxine Minx finally gets her big break. But as a mysterious killer stalks the starlets of Hollywood, a trail of blood threatens to reveal her sinister past.

recommendations.title: Unacknowledged
recommendations.overview: Dr. Steven Greer presents brand new top-secret evidence supporting extraterrestrial contact, including witness testimony, classified documents, and UFO footage, while also exploring the consequences of ruthlessly enforcing such secrecy.
